plugins {    id "io.spring.dependency-management" version "1.0.6.RELEASE"    id "com.github.johnrengelman.shadow" version "4.0.2"}apply plugin:"application"apply plugin:"groovy"version "0.1"group "example.micronaut"repositories {    mavenLocal()    mavenCentral()    maven { url "https://jcenter.bintray.com" }}dependencyManagement {    imports {        mavenBom 'io.micronaut:micronaut-bom:1.0.4'    }}/** runtime "io.micronaut:micronaut-discovery-client"*/dependencies {    compile "io.micronaut:micronaut-runtime-groovy"    compile "io.micronaut:micronaut-validation"    compile "io.micronaut:micronaut-http-client"    compile "io.micronaut:micronaut-http-server-netty"    compileOnly "io.micronaut:micronaut-inject-groovy"    runtime "ch.qos.logback:logback-classic:1.2.3"    runtime "io.micronaut:micronaut-discovery-client"    compile "io.micronaut:micronaut-inject-groovy"    compile ("org.spockframework:spock-core") {        exclude group: "org.codehaus.groovy", module: "groovy-all"    }}shadowJar {    mergeServiceFiles()}run.jvmArgs('-noverify', '-XX:TieredStopAtLevel=1')mainClassName = "example.micronaut.Application"tasks.withType(GroovyCompile) {    groovyOptions.forkOptions.jvmArgs.add('-Dgroovy.parameters=true')}

Inventory服务编写（kotlin）

步骤1：使用mn生成项目

mn create-app example.micronaut.inventory --lang kotlin

步骤2：目录

步骤3：Book.kt

package example.micronaut.beansdata class Book(val isbn: String, val stock: Int)

步骤4：BooksController.kt

package example.micronaut.controllerimport io.micronaut.http.HttpResponseimport io.micronaut.http.MediaTypeimport io.micronaut.http.annotation.Controllerimport io.micronaut.http.annotation.Getimport io.micronaut.http.annotation.Produces@Controller("/api")class BooksController {    @Produces(MediaType.TEXT_PLAIN)    @Get("/inventory/{isbn}")    fun inventory(isbn: String): HttpResponse<Int> {        // 返回book的库存信息        return when (isbn) {            "1491950358" -> HttpResponse.ok(2)            "1680502395" -> HttpResponse.ok(0) /* 1680502395 库存为0 */            else -> HttpResponse.notFound()        }    }}

步骤5：application（自动生成）

package example.micronautimport io.micronaut.runtime.Micronautobject Application {    @JvmStatic    fun main(args: Array<String>) {        Micronaut.build()                .packages("example.micronaut")                .mainClass(Application.javaClass)                .start()    }}

步骤6：application.yml

micronaut:    application:        name: inventory    server:        port: 8081consul:    client:        registration:            enabled: true        defaultZone: "${CONSUL_HOST:192.168.4.163}:${CONSUL_PORT:8500}"

步骤7：build.gradle

plugins {    id "io.spring.dependency-management" version "1.0.6.RELEASE"    id "com.github.johnrengelman.shadow" version "4.0.2"    id "org.jetbrains.kotlin.jvm" version "1.2.61"    id "org.jetbrains.kotlin.kapt" version "1.2.61"    id "org.jetbrains.kotlin.plugin.allopen" version "1.2.61"}apply plugin:"application"version "0.1"group "example.micronaut"repositories {    mavenLocal()    mavenCentral()    maven { url "https://jcenter.bintray.com" }}dependencyManagement {    imports {        mavenBom 'io.micronaut:micronaut-bom:1.0.4'    }}/** runtime "io.micronaut:micronaut-discovery-client" */dependencies {    compile "org.jetbrains.kotlin:kotlin-stdlib-jdk8:${kotlinVersion}"    compile "org.jetbrains.kotlin:kotlin-reflect:${kotlinVersion}"    compile "io.micronaut:micronaut-runtime"    compile "io.micronaut:micronaut-http-client"    compile "io.micronaut:micronaut-http-server-netty"    kapt "io.micronaut:micronaut-inject-java"    kapt "io.micronaut:micronaut-validation"    kaptTest "io.micronaut:micronaut-inject-java"    runtime "io.micronaut:micronaut-discovery-client"    runtime "ch.qos.logback:logback-classic:1.2.3"    runtime "com.fasterxml.jackson.module:jackson-module-kotlin:2.9.7"    testCompile "org.junit.jupiter:junit-jupiter-api:5.1.0"    testCompile "org.jetbrains.spek:spek-api:1.1.5"    testRuntime "org.junit.jupiter:junit-jupiter-engine:5.1.0"    testRuntime "org.jetbrains.spek:spek-junit-platform-engine:1.1.5"}shadowJar {    mergeServiceFiles()}run.jvmArgs('-noverify', '-XX:TieredStopAtLevel=1')mainClassName = "example.micronaut.Application"test {    useJUnitPlatform()}allOpen {    annotation("io.micronaut.aop.Around")}compileKotlin {    kotlinOptions {        jvmTarget = '1.8'         //Will retain parameter names for Java reflection        javaParameters = true     }}compileTestKotlin {    kotlinOptions {        jvmTarget = '1.8'         javaParameters = true     }}

测试

步骤1：启动consul

[root@localhost ~]# consul agent -server -bootstrap-expect=1 -data-dir=/tmp/consul-data -bind=192.168.4.163 -client=0.0.0.0 -ui

步骤2：启动微服务(启动无顺序)

启动成功如下

步骤3：访问gateway获取还有库存的数据本书

entry.title: 搭建ELK日志收集系统
entry.content:
下载安装

kafka：http://kafka.apache.org/downloads

zookeeper：https://www.apache.org/dyn/closer.cgi/zookeeper/（不用kafka内置的zookeeper）

jdk：https://www.oracle.com/technetwork/java/javase/downloads/index.html

命令行操作

步骤1：配置jdk环境变量

1）vim /etc/profile

在unset...前添加一下内容# user settingsJAVA_HOME=/usr/local/jdk1.8.0_201PATH=$JAVA_HOME/bin:$JAVA_HOME/jre/bin:$PATHexport JAVA_HOME PATH

2）source /etc/profile 刷新配置

步骤2：将zookeeper配置文件zoo_sample.cfg改名为zoo.cfg

mv zoo_sample.cfg zoo.cfg

步骤3：启动zookeeper（使用kafka提供的配置文件）

[root@localhost bin]# ./zkServer.sh start /usr/local/kafka_2.11-2.1.0/config/zookeeper.properties

步骤4：启动kafka服务

[root@localhost bin]# ./kafka-server-start.sh ../config/server.properties

步骤5：创建topic

[root@localhost bin]# ./kafka-topics.sh --create --zookeeper 192.168.4.157:2181 --replication-factor 1 --partitions 1 --topic test

步骤6：查看topic是否创建成功

[root@localhost bin]# ./kafka-topics.sh --zookeeper 192.168.4.157:2181 --listtest

步骤7：kafka producer生产消息

[root@localhost bin]# ./kafka-console-producer.sh --broker-list 192.168.4.157:9092 --topic test

步骤8：kafka consumer消费消息

[root@localhost bin]# ./kafka-console-consumer.sh --bootstrap-server 192.168.4.157:9092 --topic test --from-beginning

–from-beginning ：表示监听 test这个topic上的所有历史消息（即新消息和旧消息都获取-> kafka消息持久化）

代码操作

步骤1：关闭防火墙和修改配置文件

systemctl stop firewallsystemctl disable firewallvim /usr/local/kafka/config/server.properties

步骤2：配置pom.xml

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"         xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd">    <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>    <parent>        <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>        <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-parent</artifactId>        <version>2.1.2.RELEASE</version>        <relativePath/> <!-- lookup parent from repository -->    </parent>    <groupId>com.td</groupId>    <artifactId>kafkahw</artifactId>    <version>0.0.1-SNAPSHOT</version>    <name>kafkahw</name>    <description>hello world</description>    <properties>        <java.version>1.8</java.version>    </properties>    <dependencies>        <dependency>            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId>        </dependency>        <dependency>            <groupId>org.springframework.kafka</groupId>            <artifactId>spring-kafka</artifactId>        </dependency>        <dependency>            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-test</artifactId>            <scope>test</scope>        </dependency>    </dependencies>    <build>        <plugins>            <plugin>                <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>                <artifactId>spring-boot-maven-plugin</artifactId>            </plugin>        </plugins>    </build></project>

步骤3：配置springboot属性文件

server:  port: 8888  servlet:    context-path: /kafkahwspring:  kafka:    bootstrap-servers: 192.168.1.101:9092    producer:      key-serializer: org.apache.kafka.common.serialization.StringSerializer      value-serializer: org.apache.kafka.common.serialization.StringSerializer    consumer:      group-id: consumer-group      key-deserializer: org.apache.kafka.common.serialization.StringDeserializer      value-deserializer: org.apache.kafka.common.serialization.StringDeserializer

步骤4：代码

生产者

package com.td.resouce;import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;import org.springframework.kafka.core.KafkaTemplate;import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.GetMapping;import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PathVariable;import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestController;@RestControllerpublic class KafkaResource {    @Autowired    private KafkaTemplate<String, String> kafkaTemplate;    @GetMapping(value={"/","/login"})    public String login(){        return "ok";    }    @GetMapping("/send/{topic}/{content}")    public String send(@PathVariable("topic") String topic,                       @PathVariable("content") String content){        try {            System.out.println("准备发送消息...");            kafkaTemplate.send(topic, content);            System.out.println("准备发送完成...");        }catch (Exception e){            e.printStackTrace();            return "send fail";        }        return "send success";    }}

消费者

package com.td.consumer;import org.springframework.kafka.annotation.KafkaListener;import org.springframework.stereotype.Component;@Componentpublic class KafkaConsumer {    @KafkaListener(topics = "test")    public void consumer(String content){        System.out.println("监听到：" + content);    }}

启动类

package com.td;import org.springframework.boot.SpringApplication;import org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.SpringBootApplication;@SpringBootApplicationpublic class KafkahwApplication {    public static void main(String[] args) {        SpringApplication.run(KafkahwApplication.class, args);    }}

安装前端监控

步骤1：下载kafka-monitor

github：https://github.com/quantifind/KafkaOffsetMonitor

百度云盘：链接：https://pan.baidu.com/s/1c1Snar2 密码：ncjp

下载完，直接复制进去运行即可

步骤2：启动

java -cp KafkaOffsetMonitor-assembly-0.2.0.jar com.quantifind.kafka.offsetapp.OffsetGetterWeb --zk 192.168.1.101:2181 --port 8089 --refresh 10.seconds --retain 1.days

步骤3：浏览

http://192.168.1.101:8089

Kafka Connect Elasticsearch Connector（方法1）

提醒：虚拟机复制的话切记要情况elasticsearch中的data目录数据

ElasticSearch直接消费kafka消息

以下以CDC为例

步骤1：下载连接器

kafka connect ElasticSearch：https://www.confluent.io/connector/kafka-connect-elasticsearch/

Debezium：https://repo1.maven.org/maven2/io/debezium/debezium-connector-mysql/

步骤2：安装并配置

profile（将Debezium插件依赖包配置到classpath上，必须）

# user settingsJAVA_HOME=/usr/local/jdk1.8.0_201PATH=$JAVA_HOME/bin:$JAVA_HOME/jre/bin:$NODE_HOME/bin:$PATH# debezium 插件依赖export CLASSPATH=/usr/local/debezium-connector-mysql/*export JAVA_HOME PATH

server.properties（kafka server配置）

listeners=PLAINTEXT://192.168.4.159:9092

connect-distributed.properties（kafka连接器配置）

bootstrap.servers=192.168.4.159:9092key.converter.schemas.enable=falsevalue.converter.schemas.enable=false# 启用rest配置schemarest.host.name=192.168.4.159rest.port=8083# kafka connect elasticsearch插件plugin.path=/usr/local/confluentinc-kafka-connect-elasticsearch-5.1.0

elasticsearch.yml

network.host: 192.168.4.159http.port: 9200# 允许跨域访问es（es插件）http.cors.enabled: truehttp.cors.allow-origin: "*"

步骤3：启动

  1. 启动zookeeper
  2. 启动kafka server
  3. 启动elasticsearch（注意：es必须使用非root启动）
  4. 启动kafka connect

步骤4：测试

  • 配置source
POST http://192.168.4.159:8083/connectors/{    "name": "my-first-connector",    "config": {        "connector.class": "io.debezium.connector.mysql.MySqlConnector",        "database.hostname": "192.168.4.120",        "database.port": "3306",        "database.user": "tandi",        "database.password": "123456",        "database.server.id": "11111",        "database.server.name": "192.168.4.120",        "database.serverTimezone": "UTC",        "database.history.kafka.bootstrap.servers": "192.168.4.159:9092",        "database.history.kafka.topic": "192.168.4.120.db1" ,        "include.schema.changes": "true",        "transforms": "unwrap,changetopic",        "transforms.unwrap.type": "io.debezium.transforms.UnwrapFromEnvelope",        "transforms.changetopic.type":"org.apache.kafka.connect.transforms.RegexRouter",        "transforms.changetopic.regex":"(.*)",        "transforms.changetopic.replacement":"$1-smt"    }}

  • 配置sink
POST http://192.168.4.159:8083/connectors/{  "name": "elasticsearch-sink",  "config": {    "connector.class": "io.confluent.connect.elasticsearch.ElasticsearchSinkConnector",    "tasks.max": "1",    "topics": "192.168.4.120.db1.t1-smt,192.168.4.120-smt",    "key.ignore": "true",    "schema.ignore": "true",    "connection.url": "http://192.168.4.159:9200",    "type.name": "kafka-connect",    "name": "elasticsearch-sink"  }}

  • 向数据库添加数据

  • 查看ElasticSearch

Logstash整合kafka并数据到ElasticSearch（方法2）

提醒：虚拟机复制的话切记要情况elasticsearch中的data目录数据

Logstash消费kafka消息到ElasticSearch

步骤1：下载并上传Logstash到linux

logstash：https://www.elastic.co/cn/products/logstash

上传解压如下

步骤2：创建并配置Logstash启动文件

LogstashKafka.conf

[root@localhost config]# touch logstash-kafka.conf[root@localhost config]# vim logstash-kafka.conf

配置文件说明：从input获取数据输出到output

从kafka读取 - > 从kafka中获取数据消费输出到控制台

output{      input{      kafka{        bootstrap_servers => ["192.168.4.157:9092"]         # 建议和生产消息的线程组区别，同一个组不能消费同一个分区        group_id => "consumer-logs-group"        auto_offset_reset => "earliest"        consumer_threads => 5        decorate_events => true        topics => ["logs","test"]      }    }    stdout{        codec => rubydebug    }    elasticsearch {        hosts => ["192.168.4.157:9200"]        user => "tandi"        password => "tandi"        index => "%{service}-%{+YYYY-MM-dd}"    }}

向kafka输出

input{    stdin{}}output{    kafka{        topic_id => "logs"        bootstrap_servers => "192.168.4.157:9092"         batch_size => 5    stdout{        codec => rubydebug    }}

步骤3：测试从kafka中消费数据

1）启动zookeeper

2）启动kafka

3）启动logstash

[root@localhost logstash-6.5.4]# bin/logstash -f config/logstash-kafka-input-td.conf

Kibana整合ElasticSearch

切记：kibana和ElasticSearch必须版本号要一直，否者很麻烦

步骤1：下载kibana

步骤2：配置kibana

server.port: 5601 # kibana端口server.host: "192.168.4.157" # 本机端口elasticsearch.url: "http://192.168.4.157:9200" # elasticsearch urlkibana.index: ".kibana"

entry.title: Micronaut入门
entry.content:
what？

  • micronaut是一种现代的，基于JVM字节码注入的微服务全栈框架
  • 用于构建模块化，易于测试的微服务和无服务器应用程序（专门为cloud native设计/云原生应用）

  • 包含以下特性：

    • 依赖注入(无需通过反射) 和 控制翻转

    • 明智的默认值 和 自动配置

    • 基于netty

    • 配置共享

    • 服务发现

    • HTTP路由

    • 客户端负载均衡的HTTP客户端

    • 支持java，groovy，kotlin等语言

    • 启动速度快

    • 内存占用少

    • 简单的单元测试

官方文档

官网文档：https://docs.micronaut.io/latest/guide/index.html

GitHub：

https://github.com/micronaut-projects

https://github.com/micronaut-guides

hello-world

CentOS7安装步骤1：安装sdkmancurl -s "https://get.sdkman.io" | bashsource "$HOME/.sdkman/bin/sdkman-init.sh"sdk version步骤2：使用sdkman安装micronautsdk install micronaut 或者 sdk install micronaut 1.1.0.M1步骤3：快速入门案例1）使用micronaut快速构建一个maven管理的java项目[root@localhost files]# mn create-app hello-world // gradle或[root@localhost files]# sdk use maven // 安装maven[root@localhost files]# mn create-app --build maven hello-world【启动类】    import io.micronaut.runtime.Micronaut;    public class Application {        public static void main(String[] args) {            Micronaut.run(Application.class);        }    }【默认情况下，Micronaut HTTP服务器配置为在端口8080上运行】2）在添加交互代码    package hello;    import io.micronaut.http.MediaType;    import io.micronaut.http.annotation.Controller;    import io.micronaut.http.annotation.Get;    @Controller("/hello")     public class HelloController {        @Get(produces = MediaType.TEXT_PLAIN)         public String index() {            return "Hello World";         }    }3）进入hello-world下运行【gradle运行】./gradlew run【maven运行】或[root@localhost hello]# mvn compile package[root@localhost target]# java -jar hello-0.1.jar 17:59:44.811 [main] INFO  io.micronaut.runtime.Micronaut - Startup completed in 6505ms. Server Running: http://localhost.localdomain:80804）访问[root@localhost conf]# curl http://localhost:8080/helloMicronaut Hello World

ioc

ioc例子

1）添加依赖（gradle）

plugins {  id "net.ltgt.apt" version "0.18"}dependencies {    annotationProcessor "io.micronaut:micronaut-inject-java:1.0.4"    compile "io.micronaut:micronaut-inject:1.0.4"}

2）定义bean

import javax.inject.*interface Engine {     int getCylinders()    String start()}@Singleton class V8Engine implements Engine {    int cylinders = 8    String start() {        "Starting V8"    }}@Singletonclass Vehicle {    final Engine engine    Vehicle(Engine engine) {         this.engine = engine    }    String start() {        engine.start()    }}

3）构建bean

try (ApplicationContext context = ApplicationContext.run()) {     MyBean myBean = context.getBean(MyBean.class);     // do something with your bean}

依赖注入是如何工作的？

  • micronaut不是通过反射来实现依赖注入
  • micronaut使用的是AST转换（用于Groovy）和注释处理器（用于Java）来生成实现BeanDefinition接口的类
  • micronaut使用ASM字节码库生成类，并由于micronaut提前知道注入点（基于jvm），因此不需要像Spring等其他框架一样在运行时扫描所有方法，字段，构造函数等来得知注入点
  • 此外，由于在构造bean的时候不是通过反射来实现依赖注入，因此jvm可以更好地内联和优化代码，从而提高运行时性能并减少内存的消耗。这对于非单例范围的bean尤为重要，因为应用程序性能取决于bean创建性能
  • 使用micronaut开发，应用程序启动时间和内存消耗不会像使用反射的ioc框架一样取决于代码库的大小，因为基于反射的ioc框架会为代码中的每个字段，方法，构造函数等，加载和缓存反射数据。因此，随着代码规模的增长，应用对内存的需求也会增加，而使用micronaut则不是这样

BeanContext

该BeanContext中是您所有的bean定义一个容器对象（它也实现BeanDefinitionRegistry），这也是Micronaut的初始化点。但是，一般来说，您不必直接与BeanContextAPI 交互，只需使用javax.inject注解和io.micronaut.context.annotation包中定义的注解来满足依赖注入需求

@Requires

简单用例

@Singleton@Requires(beans = DataSource.class) // 应用中必须存在 DataSource.class bean实例@Requires(property = "datasource.url") // 引用中必须存在 datasource.url 配置public class JdbcBookService implements BookService {    DataSource dataSource;    public JdbcBookService(DataSource dataSource) {        this.dataSource = dataSource;    }}

使用@Requires创建派生注解

定义

@Documented@Retention(RetentionPolicy.RUNTIME)@Target({ElementType.PACKAGE, ElementType.TYPE})@Requires(beans = DataSource.class)@Requires(property = "datasource.url")public @interface RequiresJdbc {}

使用

@RequiresJdbcpublic class JdbcBookService implements BookService {    ...}

其他使用

micronaut environment

package com.td;import io.micronaut.context.ApplicationContext;import io.micronaut.context.env.Environment;import io.micronaut.runtime.server.EmbeddedServer;import org.junit.BeforeClass;import org.junit.Test;import java.util.Map;/** * 注意：进行junit时，micronaut自动开启test环境配置（application-test.yml） * @Requires(env = "test") // 注解到类上，表示当前类只有在测试环境才可用 */public class MicronautTest {    private static EmbeddedServer server;    @BeforeClass    public static void setupServer() {        server = ApplicationContext.run(EmbeddedServer.class);    }    @Test    public void test() {        // 激活环境        ApplicationContext applicationContext = ApplicationContext.run("test","android","dev"); // 激活多个配置，默认使用最后一个//        ApplicationContext applicationContext = ApplicationContext.run(); // 测试环境默认使用test，即application-test.yml//        ApplicationContext applicationContext = ApplicationContext.run("dev");        Environment environment = applicationContext.getEnvironment();        // 输入激活的环境        System.out.println( environment.getActiveNames() );        Map<String, Object> micronaut = applicationContext.getEnvironment().getProperties("micronaut");        System.out.println("application.name = " + micronaut.get("application.name"));        System.out.println("server.port = " + micronaut.get("server.port"));        System.out.println("environments = " + micronaut.get("environments"));        System.out.println("home = " + micronaut.get("home"));    }}

HTTP Server（提供服务）

gradle依赖

dependencies {    /*依赖注入相关*/    annotationProcessor "io.micronaut:micronaut-inject-java"    compileOnly "io.micronaut:micronaut-inject-java"    testCompile "io.micronaut:micronaut-inject-java"    compile "io.micronaut:micronaut-inject"    testCompile "org.hamcrest:hamcrest-all:1.3"    /* swagger(openapi协议实现) */    annotationProcessor "io.micronaut.configuration:micronaut-openapi"    compile "io.swagger.core.v3:swagger-annotations"    /*校验*/    annotationProcessor "io.micronaut:micronaut-validation"    compile "io.micronaut:micronaut-validation"    compile "io.micronaut:micronaut-runtime"    /*http-client*/    compile "io.micronaut:micronaut-http-client"    /*http-server*/    compile "io.micronaut:micronaut-http-server-netty"    /*logback日志*/    runtime "ch.qos.logback:logback-classic:1.2.3"    /*服务注册发现*/    compile "io.micronaut:micronaut-discovery-client:1.0.4"    /*junit单元测试*/    compile "junit:junit:4.12"}

controller

package com.td.controller;import io.micronaut.context.annotation.Requires;import io.micronaut.http.annotation.*;@Requires(env = "test") // 用于测试环境@Controllerpublic class HelloController {/*    @Get    @Post    @Put    @Delete    @Head    @Options    @Patch    @Trace    public String hello3 (){        return "";    }*/    @Get("/hello")    public String hello(){        return "hello micronaut http!!!";    }    /** restful规则     *      格式                     解释                               例子         /books/{id}            Simple match                        /books/1         /books/{id:2}            A variable of 2 characters max        /books/10         /books{/id}            An optional URI variable            /books/10 or /books         /book{/id:[a-zA-Z]+}    An optional URI variable with regex    /books/foo         /books{?max,offset}    Optional query parameters            /books?max=10&offset=10         /books{/path:.*}{.ext}    Regex path match with extension        /books/foo/bar.xml     */    @Get("/{number}")    public String hello2 (Integer number) {        return "请求的数字是：" + number;    }    @Get("/{name}/{age}")    public String hello3 (String name, Integer age) {        return "{name:"+ name +", age:"+ age +"}";    }}

junit test（EmbeddedServer、HttpClient）

package com.td;import io.micronaut.context.ApplicationContext;import io.micronaut.http.HttpRequest;import io.micronaut.http.client.HttpClient;import io.micronaut.runtime.server.EmbeddedServer;import org.junit.BeforeClass;import org.junit.Test;public class HttpTest {    // micronaut提供的嵌入server    private static EmbeddedServer server;    // http客户端    private static HttpClient client;    @BeforeClass    public static void setupServer() {        server = ApplicationContext.run(EmbeddedServer.class);        System.out.println("server.getURL() = " + server.getURL());        client = HttpClient.create( server.getURL() );    }    // 测试 HelloController @Get("/hello")    @Test    public void test1() {        /**         * 作用：请求 server.getURL() + /hello         * toBlocking()：返回一个适合测试和非生产场景的阻塞HTTP客户端         * retrieve(HttpRequest.GET("/hello"))：取回 HttpRequest.GET("/hello") 请求返回的内容         */        System.out.println( client.toBlocking().retrieve(HttpRequest.GET("/hello")) );    }    // 测试 @Get("/{number}")    @Test    public void test2() {        System.out.println( client.toBlocking().retrieve(HttpRequest.GET("/1")) );    }    // 测试动态绑定路由MyRoutes    // @Get("/hello/{number}")    @Test    public void test3(){        // 原来的路由地址 @Get("/{number}")        System.out.println( "@Get(\"/{number}\") = " + client.toBlocking().retrieve(HttpRequest.GET("/hello/10000")) );        // 动态绑定路由地址 @Get("/hello/{number}")        System.out.println( "@Get(\"/hello/{number}\") = " + client.toBlocking().retrieve(HttpRequest.GET("/hello/10000")) );    }    // 测试 @Get("/{name}/{age}")    @Test    public void test4() {        System.out.println( client.toBlocking().retrieve(HttpRequest.GET("/tandi/23")) );    }}

编程式绑定路由

package com.td.Building_Routes_Programmatically;import com.td.controller.HelloController;import io.micronaut.context.ExecutionHandleLocator;import io.micronaut.context.annotation.Requires;import io.micronaut.web.router.DefaultRouteBuilder;import javax.inject.Inject;import javax.inject.Singleton;/** * 功能：动态地帮助controller绑定路由 */@Requires(env = "test")//@Requires(env = "dev") // 必须dev环境才可用@Singletonpublic class MyRoutes extends DefaultRouteBuilder {    public MyRoutes(ExecutionHandleLocator executionHandleLocator, UriNamingStrategy uriNamingStrategy) {        super(executionHandleLocator, uriNamingStrategy);    }    @Inject    public void issuesRoutes(HelloController helloController) {        /**         * 注意：原来helloController.hello2  @Get("/{number}")         *         * 路由："/hello/{number}"         * 目标控制器：helloController         * 目标控制器方法：hello2         * 传入参数的类型：Integer.class         */        GET("/hello/{number}", helloController, "hello2", Integer.class);    }}

HTTP Client（消费服务）

gradle依赖

dependencies {    /*依赖注入相关*/    annotationProcessor "io.micronaut:micronaut-inject-java"    compileOnly "io.micronaut:micronaut-inject-java"    testCompile "io.micronaut:micronaut-inject-java"    compile "io.micronaut:micronaut-inject"    testCompile "org.hamcrest:hamcrest-all:1.3"    /* swagger(openapi协议实现) */    annotationProcessor "io.micronaut.configuration:micronaut-openapi"    compile "io.swagger.core.v3:swagger-annotations"    /*校验*/    annotationProcessor "io.micronaut:micronaut-validation"    compile "io.micronaut:micronaut-validation"    compile "io.micronaut:micronaut-runtime"    /*http-client*/    compile "io.micronaut:micronaut-http-client"    /*http-server*/    compile "io.micronaut:micronaut-http-server-netty"    /*logback日志*/    runtime "ch.qos.logback:logback-classic:1.2.3"    /*服务注册发现*/    compile "io.micronaut:micronaut-discovery-client:1.0.4"    /*junit单元测试*/    compile "junit:junit:4.12"}

HttpClient简单使用

package com.td.controller;import io.micronaut.http.HttpRequest;import io.micronaut.http.annotation.Controller;import io.micronaut.http.annotation.Get;import io.micronaut.http.client.HttpClient;import org.reactivestreams.Publisher;import java.net.URL;@Controllerpublic class HelloController {    @Get("/show")    public Publisher<String> show() throws Exception{        Publisher<String> retrieve = HttpClient.create(new URL("http://localhost:8080")).retrieve(HttpRequest.GET("/"));        return retrieve;    }}

微服务远程调用

参考文章《使用micronaut实现微服务》

websocket和server sent event（sse）区别

以下参考文章：http://www.importnew.com/21967.html

  1. 都可以进行服务端推送，并且都是长连接进行
  2. sse仍然使用http协议进行通讯，即正常的http报文；而websocket是使用http协议进行握手,然后再使用同一个链接进行websocket协议的通信
  3. websocket可以进行双向（双端）通讯，即server端可以向client端发送消息，client端也能向server端发送消息；sse是单向通讯，只能由server端发送消息给client端
  4. websocket自带连接的保持,即通过ping/pong协议保证连接可以始终维持,sse没有这个保证,不过可以参考ping/pong协议,自己周期性地发送信息来同样地进行处理.比如,5秒往客户端发一个特别的信息(通过type/name进行区分).其次,因为是基于浏览器的使用,sse有一个特性,就是浏览器发现一个连接断掉了,就会自动地进行重联,即重新发送请求.这样,服务端也不用担心连接被断开,不过需要处理新的请求必须和上一次请求的内容相连续,以及新的推送注册
  5. 由于都是基于浏览器使用,因此建议的数据传输都是文本型.虽然websocket支持二进制frame传输,不过一些都不建议使用.sse只能传输文本
  6. 不管是websocket还是sse,在用于通信时,都建议只用于进行数据的推送,而不是进行完整的应用处理.这里可以理解为,常规的业务处理仍然交给后端的服务来处理.这样,即可以使用之前的业务开发的优势,又可以使用推送的优势.而不是走向另一个级端,即所有的信息都想通过推送来传递

swagger（open api接口规范）

open api接口规范

OpenAPI规范始于Swagger规范，经过Reverb Technologies和SmartBear等公司多年的发展，OpenAPI计划拥有该规范（捐赠之后），OpenAPI Initiative在GitHub上托管社区驱动的规范。规范是一种与语言无关的格式，用于描述RESTful Web服务，应用程序可以解释生成的文件，这样才能生成代码、生成文档并根据其描述的服务创建模拟应用

micronaut swagger

步骤1：配置依赖和application.yml

build.gradle

dependencies {    /* swagger(openapi协议实现) */    annotationProcessor "io.micronaut.configuration:micronaut-openapi"    compile "io.swagger.core.v3:swagger-annotations"}

application.yml

micronaut:    application:        name: ioc-normal # 应用名称    server:        port: 8888#        port: -1  随机端口号#    swagger配置    router:      static-resources:        swagger:          paths: classpath:META-INF/swagger          mapping: /swagger/**#consul:#  client:#    registration:#      enabled: true#    defaultZone: "${CONSUL_HOST:192.168.4.163}:${CONSUL_PORT:8500}"

步骤2：应用open api

/*步骤1：配置swagger*/@OpenAPIDefinition(    info = @Info(        title = "Hello Swagger",        version = "0.1",        description = "第一次使用swagger",        license = @License(name = "Apache 2.0", url = "http://localhost:8888"),        contact = @Contact(url = "http://tandi.cc", name = "TanDi", email = "tandi@163.com")    ))public class Application {    public static void main(String[] args) {        Micronaut.run(Application.class);    }}

步骤3：使用例子

package com.td.controller;import io.micronaut.http.MediaType;import io.micronaut.http.annotation.Controller;import io.micronaut.http.annotation.Get;import io.swagger.v3.oas.annotations.Operation;import io.swagger.v3.oas.annotations.Parameter;import io.swagger.v3.oas.annotations.media.Content;import io.swagger.v3.oas.annotations.media.Schema;import io.swagger.v3.oas.annotations.responses.ApiResponse;import io.swagger.v3.oas.annotations.tags.Tag;import javax.validation.constraints.NotBlank;import java.util.HashMap;import java.util.Map;@Controllerpublic class HelloSwagger {    @Get("/hello")    public String hello(){        return "hello swagger my name is tandi !!!";    }    /**     * swagger注解使用     * @param name     * @return     */    @Get(uri="/hello/{name}", produces= MediaType.TEXT_PLAIN)    @Operation(       summary = "获取一个person",       description = "通过名称来去获取一个person"    )    @ApiResponse(        content = @Content(mediaType = "application/json",        schema = @Schema(type="string"))    )    @ApiResponse(responseCode = "404", description = "没有找到该person")    @Tag(name = "greeting")    public String hello(@Parameter(description="person name（名称）") @NotBlank String name) {        Map<String, String> map = new HashMap<>();        map.put("tandi", "{name:tandi, age:23}");        map.put("zhangsan", "{name:zhangsan, age:28}");        return map.get(name);    }}

步骤4：构建项目生产open api文档

构建过后，会在项目构建文件夹生成以下文件

io.micronaut.inject.BeanDefinitionReference

com.td.controller.$HelloSwaggerDefinitionClass

hello-swagger-0.1.yml

openapi: 3.0.1info:  title: Hello Swagger  description: 第一次使用swagger  contact:    name: TanDi    url: http://tandi.cc    email: tandi@163.com  license:    name: Apache 2.0    url: http://localhost:8888  version: "0.1"paths:  /hello:    get:      operationId: hello      parameters: []      responses:        default:          content:            application/json:              schema:                type: string  /hello/{name}:    get:      tags:      - greeting      summary: 获取一个person      description: 通过名称来去获取一个person      operationId: hello      parameters:      - name: name        in: path        description: person name（名称）        required: true        schema:          minLength: 1          type: string      responses:        default:          content:            application/json:              schema:                type: string        404:          description: 没有找到该person

entry.title: 认识Minio
entry.content:
minio

官方文档：https://docs.minio.io/

是什么？

  • Minio是Apache License v2.0下发布的对象存储服务器
  • 兼容Amazon S3云存储服务
  • 适合存储非结构化数据，如照片，视频，日志文件，备份和容器/ VM镜像

下载安装（centos7）

  1. 手动下载ftp传入或wget下载
  2. 将minio保存到/bin下，并授权后，tab键就可以补全
[root@localhost bin]# wget https://dl.minio.io/server/minio/release/linux-ppc64le/minio[root@localhost bin]# chmod +x ./*

minio命令参数

[root@localhost ~]# minio --helpNAME:  minio - Cloud Storage Server.DESCRIPTION:  Minio is an Amazon S3 compatible object storage server. Use it to store photos, videos, VMs, containers, log files, or any blob of data as objects.USAGE:  minio [FLAGS] COMMAND [ARGS...]COMMANDS:  server   start object storage server  gateway  start object storage gateway  update   update minio to latest release  version  print versionFLAGS:  --config-dir value, -C value  [DEPRECATED] Path to legacy configuration directory. (default: "/root/.minio")  --certs-dir value, -S value   Path to certs directory. (default: "/root/.minio/certs")  --quiet                       Disable startup information.  --anonymous                   Hide sensitive information from logging.  --json                        Output server logs and startup information in json format.  --help, -h                    Show help.VERSION:  2019-02-06T21:16:36Z

启动并访问

[root@localhost /]# minio server /dataEndpoint:  http://192.168.4.157:9000  http://172.17.0.1:9000  http://127.0.0.1:9000    AccessKey: NV2JLV2HFKMAQRJCNHK0 SecretKey: FY+YsoARfp6vIVeX8EoIIpBV+KB7XCjwyTbLWA8I Browser Access:   http://192.168.4.157:9000  http://172.17.0.1:9000  http://127.0.0.1:9000    Command-line Access: https://docs.minio.io/docs/minio-client-quickstart-guide   $ mc config host add myminio http://192.168.4.157:9000 NV2JLV2HFKMAQRJCNHK0 FY+YsoARfp6vIVeX8EoIIpBV+KB7XCjwyTbLWA8IObject API (Amazon S3 compatible):   Go:         https://docs.minio.io/docs/golang-client-quickstart-guide   Java:       https://docs.minio.io/docs/java-client-quickstart-guide   Python:     https://docs.minio.io/docs/python-client-quickstart-guide   JavaScript: https://docs.minio.io/docs/javascript-client-quickstart-guide   .NET:       https://docs.minio.io/docs/dotnet-client-quickstart-guide

注意启动数据内容包含了账号密码

AccessKey: NV2JLV2HFKMAQRJCNHK0
SecretKey: FY+YsoARfp6vIVeX8EoIIpBV+KB7XCjwyTbLWA8I

访问：http://192.168.4.157:9000

Java Client

依赖
<dependency>    <groupId>io.minio</groupId>    <artifactId>minio</artifactId>    <version>6.0.1</version></dependency>
本地上传
package com.td.utils;import io.minio.MinioClient;import io.minio.errors.MinioException;public class FileUploader {    private static String MINIO_URL = "http://192.168.4.157:9000";    private static String ACCESS_KEY = "NV2JLV2HFKMAQRJCNHK0";    private static String SECRET_KEY = "FY+YsoARfp6vIVeX8EoIIpBV+KB7XCjwyTbLWA8I";    public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {        try {            // Create a minioClient with the Minio Server name, Port, Access key and Secret key.            MinioClient minioClient = new MinioClient(MINIO_URL, ACCESS_KEY, SECRET_KEY);            // Check if the bucket already exists.            boolean isExist = minioClient.bucketExists("image");            if(isExist) {                System.out.println("Bucket already exists.");            } else {                // Make a new bucket called asiatrip to hold a zip file of photos.                minioClient.makeBucket("image");            }            // Upload the zip file to the bucket with putObject            minioClient.putObject("image","xxx01.jpg", "C:\\Users\\admin\\Pictures\\xxx01.jpg");            System.out.println("上传成功");        } catch(MinioException e) {            System.out.println("Error occurred: " + e);        }    }}

上传成功，如下

表单上传
package com.td.controller;import io.minio.MinioClient;import io.minio.errors.InvalidEndpointException;import io.minio.errors.InvalidPortException;import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.GetMapping;import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PostMapping;import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestParam;import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestController;import org.springframework.web.multipart.MultipartFile;@RestControllerpublic class FileUploadController {    private static String MINIO_URL = "http://192.168.4.161:9000";    private static String ACCESS_KEY = "E0VBO8SE41PKUF3GMG6M";    private static String SECRET_KEY = "ZYCEjSpGn3nK4hrCVEMblnXb1Q4nmPhOO8BiNDW0";    private static MinioClient minioClient;    static {        try {            // 连接minio服务器            minioClient = new MinioClient(MINIO_URL, ACCESS_KEY, SECRET_KEY);        } catch (InvalidEndpointException e) {            e.printStackTrace();        } catch (InvalidPortException e) {            e.printStackTrace();        }    }    @GetMapping("/")    public String hi(){        return "ok";    }    @PostMapping("/upload")    public String upload(@RequestParam("file") MultipartFile multipartFile){        try {            // 测试,持久化到本地//            File file = new File("C:\\Users\\admin\\Desktop",multipartFile.getOriginalFilename());//            multipartFile.transferTo(file);            // 持久化到minio            boolean isExist = minioClient.bucketExists("image");            if(isExist) {                System.out.println("Bucket already exists.");            } else {                // 创建一个桶（相当于一个分类）                minioClient.makeBucket("image");            }            minioClient.putObject("image", multipartFile.getOriginalFilename(), multipartFile.getInputStream(), multipartFile.getContentType());            return "上传成功";        }catch (Exception e){            e.printStackTrace();        }        return "上传失败";    }}

下载
package com.td.utils;import io.minio.MinioClient;import io.minio.errors.MinioException;import java.io.InputStream;import java.nio.file.Files;import java.nio.file.Paths;public class FileUploader {    private static String MINIO_URL = "http://192.168.4.157:9000";    private static String ACCESS_KEY = "NV2JLV2HFKMAQRJCNHK0";    private static String SECRET_KEY = "FY+YsoARfp6vIVeX8EoIIpBV+KB7XCjwyTbLWA8I";    private static String FILE_NAME = "xxx01.jpg";    public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {        try {            // Create a minioClient with the Minio Server name, Port, Access key and Secret key.            MinioClient minioClient = new MinioClient(MINIO_URL, ACCESS_KEY, SECRET_KEY);            // Check if the bucket already exists.            boolean isExist = minioClient.bucketExists("image");            if(isExist) {                System.out.println("Bucket already exists.");            } else {                // Make a new bucket called asiatrip to hold a zip file of photos.                minioClient.makeBucket("image");            }            // Upload the zip file to the bucket with putObject            minioClient.putObject("image", "xxx01", "C:\\Users\\admin\\Pictures\\" + FILE_NAME);            System.out.println("上传成功");            InputStream in = minioClient.getObject("image", FILE_NAME);            Files.copy(in, Paths.get("C:\\Users\\admin\\Desktop", FILE_NAME));            System.out.println("保存成功");        } catch(MinioException e) {            System.out.println("Error occurred: " + e);        }    }}

entry.title: 微服务开发技术篇-公共配置中心
entry.content:
公共配置中心介绍

基本特点

  • 提供集中化外部(公共)配置
  • 支持配置推送
  • 提供配置加密功能
  • 支持配置的环境切换

常用配置中心

  • SpringCloud Config
  • HashiCorp Consul
  • 携程 Apollo
  • 阿里巴巴 Nacos
  • ZooKeeper

bootstrap.yml和application.yml区别

  • bootstrap.yml 加载顺序优先于 application.yml
  • 因为 application.yml 在 bootstrap.yml 后，所以前者配置可以覆盖后者配置
  • 如果使用了配置中心，则配置中心的相关配置及其依赖到的配置都应该在 bootstrap.yml 中配置

SpringCloud Config

基本介绍

  • SpringCloud Config主要分为两个角色：Config Server、Config Client
  • SpringCloud Config默认采用Git库来存储外部配置。除此之外还支持Subversion、FileSystem、CredHub、JDBC等等
  • Config Client 会在微服务启动是的环境初始化阶段向 Config Server 获取外部配置并添加到自己的环境中

快速入门

Config Server

  • 规范的做法是 Config Server 应该是一个独立的微服务

到GitHub或者Gitlab中创建存储配置的库

  • 步骤1：创建存储配置的库

  • 步骤2：上传微服务外置配置内容文件

    各个文件内容如下（实际开发根据自己的需求来抽取配置）：

    # msa-config-client-default.ymlinfo:  desc: default# msa-config-client-dev.ymlinfo:  desc: dev  qq: 497870337# msa-config-client-test.ymlinfo:  desc: test# msa-config-client-pro.ymlinfo:  desc: pro

    关于外置配置文件的命名规则：

    • 格式：微服务名称-环境。文件可以是yaml或者properties
    • 微服务名称可以表示为application。环境则可以表示为profile
    • 例如，msa-config-client-test.yml。其中 application 就是 msa-config-client，而 profile 则是 test
    • 需要强调的是，微服务中的 spring.application.name 必须和外置配置文件名称的application部分对应，否则无法获取到外置配置。换句话就是 spring.application.name 必须和 外置配置文件名称的 application 一致

依赖

<parent>    <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>    <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-parent</artifactId>    <version>2.1.5.RELEASE</version>    <relativePath/> <!-- lookup parent from repository --></parent><properties>    <java.version>1.8</java.version>    <spring-cloud.version>Greenwich.SR2</spring-cloud.version></properties><dependencyManagement>    <dependencies>        <dependency>            <groupId>org.springframework.cloud</groupId>            <artifactId>spring-cloud-dependencies</artifactId>            <version>${spring-cloud.version}</version>            <type>pom</type>            <scope>import</scope>        </dependency>    </dependencies></dependencyManagement><dependencies>    <!-- SpringCloud Config Server -->    <dependency>        <groupId>org.springframework.cloud</groupId>        <artifactId>spring-cloud-config-server</artifactId>    </dependency>    <!-- SpringCloud Netflix Client -->    <dependency>        <groupId>org.springframework.cloud</groupId>        <artifactId>spring-cloud-starter-netflix-eureka-client</artifactId>    </dependency></dependencies>

配置 - bootstrap.yml

# 方便查看这里暴露所有信息端点management:  endpoints:    web:      exposure:        include: '*'server:  port: 8808spring:  application:    name: msa-config-server  cloud:    config:      server:        git:          uri: https://github.com/tandi960505/git-config          # 只读操作无需密码          # username:          # password:          clone-on-start: true # 启动时克隆配置文件。否则需要等到有Config Client请求才加载          basedir: C:/Users/admin/Desktop/git # 保存克隆库的文件夹。默认在系统的临时文件夹中          refresh-rate: 300 # 配置刷新频率。默认为0，表示接收到Client请求才刷新eureka:  client:    serviceUrl:      defaultZone: http://localhost:8761/eureka/

启动功能

@EnableEurekaClient@EnableConfigServer@SpringBootApplicationpublic class MsaConfigServerApplication {    public static void main(String[] args) {        SpringApplication.run(MsaConfigServerApplication.class, args);    }}

测试Config Server

关于获取配置信息的请求URI格式：

# {}表示必须的，[]标识可选的格式1：/{application}/{profile}[/{label}]格式2：/{application}-{profile}.后缀名格式3：/{label}/{application}-{profile}.后缀名

Config Client

依赖

<parent>    <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>    <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-parent</artifactId>    <version>2.1.5.RELEASE</version>    <relativePath/> <!-- lookup parent from repository --></parent><properties>    <java.version>1.8</java.version>    <spring-cloud.version>Greenwich.SR2</spring-cloud.version></properties><dependencyManagement>    <dependencies>        <dependency>            <groupId>org.springframework.cloud</groupId>            <artifactId>spring-cloud-dependencies</artifactId>            <version>${spring-cloud.version}</version>            <type>pom</type>            <scope>import</scope>        </dependency>    </dependencies></dependencyManagement><dependencies>    <dependency>        <groupId>org.springframework.cloud</groupId>        <artifactId>spring-cloud-starter-config</artifactId>    </dependency>    <dependency>        <groupId>org.springframework.cloud</groupId>        <artifactId>spring-cloud-starter-netflix-eureka-client</artifactId>    </dependency>    <dependency>        <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>        <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId>    </dependency>    <dependency>        <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>        <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-actuator</artifactId>    </dependency></dependencies>

配置 - bootstrap.yaml

eureka:  client:    serviceUrl:      defaultZone: http://localhost:8761/eureka/spring:  application:    name: msa-config-client   cloud:    config:      discovery:        enabled: true # 启用配置中心服务发现功能        service-id: MSA-CONFIG-SERVER # 注册中心上的配置中心service-id      profile: dev      label: master # label表示GitHub库的分支，默认为master      fail-fast: true # 当获取不到Config Server配置则快速启动失败，即不希望该微服务启动server:  port: 8809
  • 默认情况下 Config Client 会使用 spring.application.name 来作为请求的 {application} 值
  • {application} 也可以使用 spring.cloud.config.name 来设置 （推荐）

配置- application.yml

management:  endpoints:    web:      exposure:        include: '*'

启用功能

// @EnableEurekaClient // 在Config Client中配置了服务发现后后无需显示配置注解。参考：DiscoveryClientConfigServiceBootstrapConfiguration@SpringBootApplicationpublic class MsaConfigClientApplication {    public static void main(String[] args) {        SpringApplication.run(MsaConfigClientApplication.class, args);    }}
  • 特别注意，如果 Config Server 在 Config Client 之后启动的话，Config Client会因为初始化阶段无法获取到配置会报找不到配置中心的出错误。即使 Config Server 随后启动，Config Client也无法主动获取到外部配置。解决方案如下：
    • 通过服务编排来设置 Config Server 和 Config Client 的启动顺序
    • 手动刷新 Config Client 让其重新获取外部配置（前提是Config Server成功启动提供服务），但前提是没有开启 fail-fast

测试以下是否能获取到配置中心的配置内容

修改外部配置

模拟修改外部配置后刷新Config Client让其获取最近状态的配置

  • 修改外部配置

  • 没刷新配置之前

  • 刷新配置

    ~ curl -X POST http://localhost:8809/actuator/refresh["config.client.version","info.name"]

源码浅析

Config Server

  • 默认情况下 SpringCloud Conofig 采用Git库来存储外部配置
  • 对Git的操作使用的是第三方开源类库 Eclipse JGit
如何获取库中的配置？

参考自动配置类 ConfigServerAutoConfiguration

// 启用ConfigServerProperties来获取配置中的信息@EnableConfigurationProperties(ConfigServerProperties.class)@Import({ EnvironmentRepositoryConfiguration.class, // 先看本地环境库配置         CompositeConfiguration.class,        ResourceRepositoryConfiguration.class, ConfigServerEncryptionConfiguration.class,        ConfigServerMvcConfiguration.class })public class ConfigServerAutoConfiguration {}

进入 EnvironmentRepositoryConfiguration

// 以下是Spring Cloud Config支持的外置库类型@Import({ CompositeRepositoryConfiguration.class, JdbcRepositoryConfiguration.class,        VaultConfiguration.class,          VaultRepositoryConfiguration.class,        CredhubConfiguration.class,         CredhubRepositoryConfiguration.class,        SvnRepositoryConfiguration.class, NativeRepositoryConfiguration.class,        GitRepositoryConfiguration.class, DefaultRepositoryConfiguration.class }) // 默认库操作public class EnvironmentRepositoryConfiguration {    @Configuration    @ConditionalOnMissingBean(value = EnvironmentRepository.class, search = SearchStrategy.CURRENT)    class DefaultRepositoryConfiguration {        @Bean        public MultipleJGitEnvironmentRepository defaultEnvironmentRepository(            MultipleJGitEnvironmentRepositoryFactory gitEnvironmentRepositoryFactory,            MultipleJGitEnvironmentProperties environmentProperties) throws Exception {                // 默认采用Git，传入environmentProperties构建            return gitEnvironmentRepositoryFactory.build(environmentProperties);        }    }}

MultipleJGitEnvironmentRepository 关系图

查看大图

克隆远程库过程

  • 这里将配置设置成 clone-on-start: true 。表示让Config Server启动后边去获取配置文件。过程如下：

    public class JGitEnvironmentRepository /**/ {    @Override    public synchronized void afterPropertiesSet() throws Exception {        initialize();        // 如果配置了clone-on-start:true则马上克隆库        if (this.cloneOnStart) {             initClonedRepository();        }    }    private void initClonedRepository() throws GitAPIException, IOException {        if (!getUri().startsWith(FILE_URI_PREFIX)) {            // 如果已经存在则先删除BaseDir目录            // BaseDir可以在配置中指定。默认位于temp/tmp临时文件夹下            deleteBaseDirIfExists();            // 克隆远程库到本地库            Git git = cloneToBasedir();            // ...        }    }}public class MultipleJGitEnvironmentRepository extends JGitEnvironmentRepository {    @Override    public void afterPropertiesSet() throws Exception {        // 调用父类的afterPropertiesSet()        super.afterPropertiesSet();        for (String name : this.repos.keySet()) {            PatternMatchingJGitEnvironmentRepository repo = this.repos.get(name);            repo.setEnvironment(getEnvironment());            // ...            // 设置配置数据            // ...            repo.afterPropertiesSet();        }    }}

    拓展：

    afterPropertiesSet() 方法位于 org.springframework.beans.factory.InitializingBean 接口中。InitializingBean 接口是SpringBean生命周期接口，即会在Spring容器初始化Bean是调用。

获取配置的REST控制器

自动配置类 ConfigServerAutoConfiguration

//...ConfigServerMvcConfiguration.class }) // 控制器配置public class ConfigServerAutoConfiguration { }

ConfigServerMvcConfiguration

@Configuration@ConditionalOnWebApplicationpublic class ConfigServerMvcConfiguration extends WebMvcConfigurerAdapter {    @Autowired(required = false)    private EnvironmentEncryptor environmentEncryptor;    @Autowired(required = false)    private ObjectMapper objectMapper = new ObjectMapper();    // ...    @Bean    public EnvironmentController environmentController(            EnvironmentRepository envRepository, ConfigServerProperties server) {        EnvironmentController controller = new EnvironmentController(                encrypted(envRepository, server), this.objectMapper);        controller.setStripDocumentFromYaml(server.isStripDocumentFromYaml());        controller.setAcceptEmpty(server.isAcceptEmpty());        return controller;    }    @Bean    @ConditionalOnBean(ResourceRepository.class)    public ResourceController resourceController(ResourceRepository repository,            EnvironmentRepository envRepository, ConfigServerProperties server) {        ResourceController controller = new ResourceController(repository,                encrypted(envRepository, server));        return controller;    }    private EnvironmentRepository encrypted(EnvironmentRepository envRepository,            ConfigServerProperties server) {        EnvironmentEncryptorEnvironmentRepository encrypted = new EnvironmentEncryptorEnvironmentRepository(                envRepository, this.environmentEncryptor);        encrypted.setOverrides(server.getOverrides());        return encrypted;    }}

EnvironmentController

@RestController@RequestMapping(method = RequestMethod.GET, path = "${spring.cloud.config.server.prefix:}")public class EnvironmentController {    private EnvironmentRepository repository;    private ObjectMapper objectMapper;    private boolean stripDocument = true;    private boolean acceptEmpty = true;    // ...    @RequestMapping("/{name}/{profiles:.*[^-].*}")    public Environment defaultLabel(@PathVariable String name,            @PathVariable String profiles) {        //...    }    @RequestMapping("/{name}/{profiles}/{label:.*}")    public Environment labelled(@PathVariable String name, @PathVariable String profiles,            @PathVariable String label) {        //...    }    @RequestMapping("/{name}-{profiles}.properties")    public ResponseEntity<String> properties(@PathVariable String name,            @PathVariable String profiles,            @RequestParam(defaultValue = "true") boolean resolvePlaceholders)            throws IOException {        //...    }    @RequestMapping("/{label}/{name}-{profiles}.properties")    public ResponseEntity<String> labelledProperties(@PathVariable String name,            @PathVariable String profiles, @PathVariable String label,            @RequestParam(defaultValue = "true") boolean resolvePlaceholders)            throws IOException {        //...    }    @RequestMapping("{name}-{profiles}.json")    public ResponseEntity<String> jsonProperties(@PathVariable String name,            @PathVariable String profiles,            @RequestParam(defaultValue = "true") boolean resolvePlaceholders)            throws Exception {        //...    }    @RequestMapping("/{label}/{name}-{profiles}.json")    public ResponseEntity<String> labelledJsonProperties(@PathVariable String name,            @PathVariable String profiles, @PathVariable String label,            @RequestParam(defaultValue = "true") boolean resolvePlaceholders)            throws Exception {        //...    }    @RequestMapping({ "/{name}-{profiles}.yml", "/{name}-{profiles}.yaml" })    public ResponseEntity<String> yaml(@PathVariable String name,            @PathVariable String profiles,            @RequestParam(defaultValue = "true") boolean resolvePlaceholders)            throws Exception {        //...    }    @RequestMapping({ "/{label}/{name}-{profiles}.yml",            "/{label}/{name}-{profiles}.yaml" })    public ResponseEntity<String> labelledYaml(@PathVariable String name,            @PathVariable String profiles, @PathVariable String label,            @RequestParam(defaultValue = "true") boolean resolvePlaceholders)            throws Exception {        //...    }    @ExceptionHandler(RepositoryException.class)    public void noSuchLabel(HttpServletResponse response) throws IOException {        response.sendError(HttpStatus.NOT_FOUND.value());    }    @ExceptionHandler(IllegalArgumentException.class)    public void illegalArgument(HttpServletResponse response) throws IOException {        response.sendError(HttpStatus.BAD_REQUEST.value());    }    private HttpHeaders getHttpHeaders(MediaType mediaType) {        HttpHeaders httpHeaders = new HttpHeaders();        httpHeaders.setContentType(mediaType);        return httpHeaders;    }    private ResponseEntity<String> getSuccess(String body) {        return new ResponseEntity<>(body, getHttpHeaders(MediaType.TEXT_PLAIN),                HttpStatus.OK);    }    private ResponseEntity<String> getSuccess(String body, MediaType mediaType) {        return new ResponseEntity<>(body, getHttpHeaders(mediaType), HttpStatus.OK);    }    // ...}

ResourceController

@RestController@RequestMapping(method = RequestMethod.GET, path = "${spring.cloud.config.server.prefix:}")public class ResourceController {    private ResourceRepository resourceRepository;    private EnvironmentRepository environmentRepository;    private UrlPathHelper helper = new UrlPathHelper();    @RequestMapping("/{name}/{profile}/{label}/**")    public String retrieve(@PathVariable String name, @PathVariable String profile,            @PathVariable String label, ServletWebRequest request,            @RequestParam(defaultValue = "true") boolean resolvePlaceholders)            throws IOException {        String path = getFilePath(request, name, profile, label);        return retrieve(request, name, profile, label, path, resolvePlaceholders);    }    @RequestMapping(value = "/{name}/{profile}/**", params = "useDefaultLabel")    public String retrieve(@PathVariable String name, @PathVariable String profile,            ServletWebRequest request,            @RequestParam(defaultValue = "true") boolean resolvePlaceholders)            throws IOException {        String path = getFilePath(request, name, profile, null);        return retrieve(request, name, profile, null, path, resolvePlaceholders);    }    private String getFilePath(ServletWebRequest request, String name, String profile,            String label) {        String stem;        if (label != null) {            stem = String.format("/%s/%s/%s/", name, profile, label);        }        else {            stem = String.format("/%s/%s/", name, profile);        }        String path = this.helper.getPathWithinApplication(request.getRequest());        path = path.substring(path.indexOf(stem) + stem.length());        return path;    }    @RequestMapping(value = "/{name}/{profile}/{label}/**", produces = MediaType.APPLICATION_OCTET_STREAM_VALUE)    public byte[] binary(@PathVariable String name, @PathVariable String profile,            @PathVariable String label, ServletWebRequest request) throws IOException {        String path = getFilePath(request, name, profile, label);        return binary(request, name, profile, label, path);    }    @RequestMapping(value = "/{name}/{profile}/**", params = "useDefaultLabel", produces = MediaType.APPLICATION_OCTET_STREAM_VALUE)    public byte[] binary(@PathVariable String name, @PathVariable String profile,            ServletWebRequest request) throws IOException {        String path = getFilePath(request, name, profile, null);        return binary(request, name, profile, null, path);    }    // ...    @ExceptionHandler(NoSuchResourceException.class)    @ResponseStatus(HttpStatus.NOT_FOUND)    public void notFound(NoSuchResourceException e) {    }}

Config Client

启动时是如何获取外部配置的？

自动配置类 ConfigServiceBootstrapConfiguration

@Configuration@EnableConfigurationPropertiespublic class ConfigServiceBootstrapConfiguration {    @Autowired    private ConfigurableEnvironment environment;    @Bean    public ConfigClientProperties configClientProperties() {        ConfigClientProperties client = new ConfigClientProperties(this.environment);        return client;    }    // 【重】：外置配置定位器    @Bean    @ConditionalOnMissingBean(ConfigServicePropertySourceLocator.class)    @ConditionalOnProperty(value = "spring.cloud.config.enabled", matchIfMissing = true)    public ConfigServicePropertySourceLocator configServicePropertySource(            ConfigClientProperties properties) {        ConfigServicePropertySourceLocator locator = new ConfigServicePropertySourceLocator(                properties);        return locator;    }    // 重试操作：需要spring retry和spring aop依赖支持    @ConditionalOnProperty("spring.cloud.config.fail-fast")    @ConditionalOnClass({ Retryable.class, Aspect.class, AopAutoConfiguration.class })    @Configuration    @EnableRetry(proxyTargetClass = true)    @Import(AopAutoConfiguration.class)    @EnableConfigurationProperties(RetryProperties.class)    protected static class RetryConfiguration {        @Bean        @ConditionalOnMissingBean(name = "configServerRetryInterceptor")        public RetryOperationsInterceptor configServerRetryInterceptor(                RetryProperties properties) {            return RetryInterceptorBuilder.stateless()                    .backOffOptions(properties.getInitialInterval(),                            properties.getMultiplier(), properties.getMaxInterval())                    .maxAttempts(properties.getMaxAttempts()).build();        }    }}

进入 ConfigServicePropertySourceLocator

@Order(0) // 最高优先级别(Order值最小优先级别越高)public class ConfigServicePropertySourceLocator implements PropertySourceLocator {    private RestTemplate restTemplate;    private ConfigClientProperties defaultProperties;    // ...    @Override    @Retryable(interceptor = "configServerRetryInterceptor")    public org.springframework.core.env.PropertySource<?> locate(            org.springframework.core.env.Environment environment) {        ConfigClientProperties properties = this.defaultProperties.override(environment);        CompositePropertySource composite = new CompositePropertySource("configService");        RestTemplate restTemplate = this.restTemplate == null? getSecureRestTemplate(properties) : this.restTemplate;        try {            // ...            for (String label : labels) {                // 获取远程配置                Environment result = getRemoteEnvironment(restTemplate, properties,label.trim(), state);                if (result != null) {                    if (result.getPropertySources() != null) {                        for (PropertySource source : result.getPropertySources()) {                            @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")                            Map<String, Object> map = (Map<String, Object>) source                                    .getSource();                            composite.addPropertySource(                                    new MapPropertySource(source.getName(), map));                        }                    }                    if (StringUtils.hasText(result.getState())                            || StringUtils.hasText(result.getVersion())) {                        HashMap<String, Object> map = new HashMap<>();                        putValue(map, "config.client.state", result.getState());                        putValue(map, "config.client.version", result.getVersion());                        composite.addFirstPropertySource(new MapPropertySource("configClient", map));                    }                    // 返回远程配置map(CompositePropertySource)                    return composite;                }            }        }        // ...    }    private Environment getRemoteEnvironment(RestTemplate restTemplate,            ConfigClientProperties properties, String label, String state) {        // 请求格式        String path = "/{name}/{profile}";        String name = properties.getName();        String profile = properties.getProfile();        String token = properties.getToken();        int noOfUrls = properties.getUri().length;        if (noOfUrls > 1) {            logger.info("Multiple Config Server Urls found listed.");        }        Object[] args = new String[] { name, profile };        if (StringUtils.hasText(label)) {            if (label.contains("/")) {                label = label.replace("/", "(_)");            }            args = new String[] { name, profile, label };            path = path + "/{label}";        }        ResponseEntity<Environment> response = null;        for (int i = 0; i < noOfUrls; i++) {            Credentials credentials = properties.getCredentials(i);            String uri = credentials.getUri();            String username = credentials.getUsername();            String password = credentials.getPassword();            // 构建请求头            HttpHeaders headers = new HttpHeaders();            // 添加请求权限            addAuthorizationToken(properties, headers, username, password);            if (StringUtils.hasText(token)) {                headers.add(TOKEN_HEADER, token);            }            if (StringUtils.hasText(state) && properties.isSendState()) {                headers.add(STATE_HEADER, state);            }            headers.setAccept(Collections.singletonList(MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON));            final HttpEntity<Void> entity = new HttpEntity<>((Void) null, headers);            // 发送请求            response = restTemplate.exchange(uri + path, HttpMethod.GET, entity,Environment.class, args);            Environment result = response.getBody();            return result;        }        return null;    }    private void addAuthorizationToken(ConfigClientProperties configClientProperties,            HttpHeaders httpHeaders, String username, String password) {        String authorization = configClientProperties.getHeaders().get(AUTHORIZATION);        if (password != null) {            byte[] token = Base64Utils.encode((username + ":" + password).getBytes());            httpHeaders.add("Authorization", "Basic " + new String(token));        }        else if (authorization != null) {            httpHeaders.add("Authorization", authorization);        }    }}
SpringBoot是如何刷新配置？

SpringBoot Actuator 的 refresh 端点

在快如入门中我们已经尝试过当配置被修改后如何刷新配置，就是使用 SpringBoot Actuator 提供的端点操作 /refresh 来实现。以下为 refresh 端点源码：

@Endpoint(id = "refresh")public class RefreshEndpoint {    // 上下文刷新器    private ContextRefresher contextRefresher;    public RefreshEndpoint(ContextRefresher contextRefresher) {        this.contextRefresher = contextRefresher;    }    @WriteOperation    public Collection<String> refresh() {        // 刷新配置操作        Set<String> keys = this.contextRefresher.refresh();        return keys;    }}
  • 可以看到，当请求 /refresh端点的时候实质就是使用 ContextRefresher 来刷新配置的
  • 现在得知的信息是 ContextRefresher 可以刷新 SpringBoot 的配置。那么ContextRefresher 是怎么创建的呢？

进入 refresh端点 的自动配置类 RefreshEndpointAutoConfiguration

// ...@AutoConfigureAfter({ LifecycleMvcEndpointAutoConfiguration.class,                     RefreshAutoConfiguration.class }) // 要求在RefreshAutoConfiguration之后public class RefreshEndpointAutoConfiguration {    //...    @Configuration    @ConditionalOnBean(PropertySourceBootstrapConfiguration.class)    protected static class RefreshEndpointConfiguration {            @Bean        @ConditionalOnBean(ContextRefresher.class)        @ConditionalOnEnabledEndpoint        @ConditionalOnMissingBean        public RefreshEndpoint refreshEndpoint(ContextRefresher contextRefresher) {            // 使用上下文刷新器ContextRefresher构建一个Refresh端点            // ContextRefresher在RefreshAutoConfiguration中被添加到容器            return new RefreshEndpoint(contextRefresher);        }    }}

进入 RefreshAutoConfiguration

// ...@Configuration@ConditionalOnClass(RefreshScope.class) public class RefreshAutoConfiguration {    // 要求Bean的socpe为refresh    public static final String REFRESH_SCOPE_NAME = "refresh";    // RefreshScope：负责被@Scope('refresh')标注的Bean的刷新操作    @Bean    @ConditionalOnMissingBean(RefreshScope.class)    public static RefreshScope refreshScope() {        return new RefreshScope();    }    // ContextRefresher：负责刷新上下文配置    @Bean    @ConditionalOnMissingBean    public ContextRefresher contextRefresher(ConfigurableApplicationContext context,            RefreshScope scope) {        return new ContextRefresher(context, scope);    }    // Refresh事件监听者    @Bean    public RefreshEventListener refreshEventListener(ContextRefresher contextRefresher) {        return new RefreshEventListener(contextRefresher);    }    // ...}
  • @RefreshScope（@Scope(‘refresh’)） 是 spring-cloud-context 对 spring-framework-content Scope 功能的扩展
  • 需要注意的是如果使用了服务注册，那么当发生刷新操作时 RefreshScope 会使用 ApplicationContext 发布一个 RefreshScopeRefreshedEvent 事件，而 EurekaClientConfigurationRefresher 就是监听者之一。EurekaClientConfigurationRefresher 会将当前服务在注册中心下线然后再上线，用着中方法来达到注册中心中的服务信息刷新

现在我们知道了刷新操作实质就是 ContextRefresher.refresh() 。也了解到 RefreshScope 负责@RefreshScope Bean刷新。那么我们进入 ContextRefresher 来研究一下源码

public class ContextRefresher {    private static final String REFRESH_ARGS_PROPERTY_SOURCE = "refreshArgs";    // 默认配置源    private static final String[] DEFAULT_PROPERTY_SOURCES = new String[] {            CommandLinePropertySource.COMMAND_LINE_PROPERTY_SOURCE_NAME, // commandLineArgs            "defaultProperties" };    // 标准配置源    private Set<String> standardSources = new HashSet<>(            Arrays.asList(StandardEnvironment.SYSTEM_PROPERTIES_PROPERTY_SOURCE_NAME, // systemProperties                    StandardEnvironment.SYSTEM_ENVIRONMENT_PROPERTY_SOURCE_NAME, // systemEnvironment                    StandardServletEnvironment.JNDI_PROPERTY_SOURCE_NAME, // jndiProperties                    StandardServletEnvironment.SERVLET_CONFIG_PROPERTY_SOURCE_NAME, // servletConfigInitParams                    StandardServletEnvironment.SERVLET_CONTEXT_PROPERTY_SOURCE_NAME, // servletContextInitParams                    "configurationProperties"));    private ConfigurableApplicationContext context;    private RefreshScope scope;    public ContextRefresher(ConfigurableApplicationContext context, RefreshScope scope) {        this.context = context;        this.scope = scope;    }    // 【重】刷新环境配置    public synchronized Set<String> refresh() {        // 刷新环境，并返回改动配置        Set<String> keys = refreshEnvironment();        // 清除上下文对Scope为Refresh的Bean的缓存        // 这里的上下文指的是StandardScopeCache和ThreadLocalScopeCache        this.scope.refreshAll();        return keys;    }    public synchronized Set<String> refreshEnvironment() {        // 刷新前的配置        Map<String, Object> before = extract(this.context.getEnvironment().getPropertySources());        // 【重】刷新配置核心操作        addConfigFilesToEnvironment();        // 刷新后的配置（只有新增或新修改的配置）        Set<String> keys = changes(before,extract(this.context.getEnvironment().getPropertySources())).keySet();        // 在当前上下文中发布一个环境修改事件        this.context.publishEvent(new EnvironmentChangeEvent(this.context, keys));        return keys;    }    ConfigurableApplicationContext addConfigFilesToEnvironment() {        ConfigurableApplicationContext capture = null;        try {            // 获取当前环境（只包含DEFAULT_PROPERTY_SOURCES）            StandardEnvironment environment = copyEnvironment(this.context.getEnvironment());            /**** 核心思想:创建一个新的SpringBoot来重新加载一遍配置(从另外角度来看这是个重量级操作) ****/            // 获取一个SpringBoot应用构建者            SpringApplicationBuilder builder = new SpringApplicationBuilder(Empty.class)                    .bannerMode(Mode.OFF) // 不打印Banner                    .web(WebApplicationType.NONE) // 不是一个Web应用，即无需启动Web容器                    .environment(environment); // 当前环境（只包含DEFAULT_PROPERTY_SOURCES）作为参数            builder.application().setListeners(Arrays.asList(new BootstrapApplicationListener(),                            new ConfigFileApplicationListener()));            // 启动SpringBoot            capture = builder.run();             if (environment.getPropertySources().contains(REFRESH_ARGS_PROPERTY_SOURCE)) {                environment.getPropertySources().remove(REFRESH_ARGS_PROPERTY_SOURCE);            }            // 当前程序所处的环境（主环境）            MutablePropertySources target = this.context.getEnvironment().getPropertySources();            String targetName = null;            // 将SpringBoot加载到的内容添加到主环境            for (PropertySource<?> source : environment.getPropertySources()) {                String name = source.getName();                if (target.contains(name)) {                    targetName = name;                }                if (!this.standardSources.contains(name)) {                    if (target.contains(name)) {                        // 主环境包含该配置则直接替换值                        target.replace(name, source);                    }                    // 如果主环境中没有该配置则添加                    else {                        if (targetName != null) {                            target.addAfter(targetName, source);                        }                        else {                            // targetName was null so we are at the start of the list                            target.addFirst(source);                            targetName = name;                        }                    }                }            }        }        return capture;    }}

org.springframework.cloud.context.scope.refresh.RefreshScope#refreshAll

// 大概意思是，处理当前范围的Bean，让其下次操作时达到刷新的效果@ManagedOperation(description = "Dispose of the current instance of all beans in this scope and force a refresh on next method execution.")public void refreshAll() {    super.destroy(); // 清楚 ScopeCache    // 发布刷新域已成功刷新事件，以广播给监听者做对应处理    this.context.publishEvent(new RefreshScopeRefreshedEvent());}
  • ScopeCache的意义在于当前操作上下文。例如用户正在操作系统，但在这期间刷新了配置，那么通过清楚上下文的ScopeCache，用户在下一个操作就能够感知到
  • 关于ScopeCache 参考：org.springframework.cloud.context.scope.GenericScope

RefreshScopeRefreshedEvent 的监听者 EurekaClientConfigurationRefresher

@Configuration@ConditionalOnClass(RefreshScopeRefreshedEvent.class)protected static class EurekaClientConfigurationRefresher        implements ApplicationListener<RefreshScopeRefreshedEvent> {    @Autowired(required = false)    private EurekaClient eurekaClient;    @Autowired(required = false)    private EurekaAutoServiceRegistration autoRegistration;    public void onApplicationEvent(RefreshScopeRefreshedEvent event) {        // 如果还没有创建EurekaClient，则将强制创建        // 以确保刷新事件后顺利重新注册客户端        if (eurekaClient != null)             eurekaClient.getApplications();        }        if (autoRegistration != null) {            // 从注册中心下线服务            this.autoRegistration.stop();            // 注册服务到注册中心            this.autoRegistration.start();        }    }}
  • 重新注册服务的意义在于，预防当前 Discovery Client 注册在注册中心的元数据被更改了

配置刷新总结：

  • 如果一个Bean依赖环境中的配置，应该使用 @Scope('refresh') 或 @RefreshScope 标注，只有这样Bean才可以感知到配置刷新。原因是 SpringCloud 会将被 @RefreshScope 标注的Bean打包成 BeanLifecycleWrapper 存放到 ScopeCache 中（ConcurrentHashMap）作为操作上限文使用的Bean，当刷新操作触发时就会将 ScopeCache 的内容删除，这样一来下次使用Bean时就会重新打包 BeanLifecycleWrapper 以达到刷新效果
  • @RefreshScope不一定要使用了配合中心才可以使用。手动修改了配置都可以使用端点来刷新配置
  • 如果想手动实现刷新，则可以参考 RefreshEndpoint 使用 ContextRefresher 来实现

其他功能

单库多文件夹配置

bootstrap.yaml

spring:  application:    name: msa-config-server  cloud:    config:      server:        git:          uri: https://github.com/tandi960505/git-config          basedir: C:/Users/admin/Desktop/git          search-paths: '{application}'          # 在git-config库下找对应的{application}文件夹
  • 原来：1个应用 <—> 1个库
  • 现在：n个应用 <—> 1个库n个文件夹
  • {application} 是 Config Client 的 spring.cloud.config.name(优先) 或 spring.application.name
  • 查找规则：先从 /git-config/{application} 查找，在到 /git-config查找

详细文档： https://cloud.spring.io/spring-cloud-config/2.1.x/single/spring-cloud-config.html#_placeholders_in_git_uri

服务端添加登录访问限制

服务端

依赖

<dependency>    <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>    <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-security</artifactId></dependency>

配置

spring:  security:    user:      name: admin      password: admin

客户端

spring:  application:    name: msa-config-client  cloud:    config:      discovery:        enabled: true        service-id: MSA-CONFIG-SERVER      profile: dev      label: master       # 访问Config Server的账号      username: admin      password: admin

对配置进行非对称加密

  目前库中的配置都是明文编写的，但有时候我们并不希望这样。譬如一些敏感的配置（账号密码）我们不太想让其他共用该Git库环境的人看到。在SpringCloud Config中提供了 对称加密 和 非对称加密两种操作，以下例子为 非对称加密。详细参考文档： https://cloud.spring.io/spring-cloud-config/2.1.x/single/spring-cloud-config.html#_placeholders_in_git_uri

步骤1：使用JDK的keystore生成加密文件

keytool -genkeypair -alias mytestkey -keyalg RSA -keypass helloo -keystore server.jks -storepass 123456
  • alias：别名
  • keyalg：算法
  • keypass：secret（盐）
  • keystore：生成的秘钥文件
  • storepass：访问秘钥文件的密码

步骤2：配置Config Server

encrypt:  key-store:      # 将文件保存到classpath下    location: server.jks    password: 123456    secret: helloo    alias: mytestkey
  • 重启服务

步骤3：将需要加密的内容加密

可以先用 http://localhost:8808/encrypt/status 测试是否成功开启encrypt功能

# 加密curl http://localhost:8808/encrypt -d 明文# 解密curl http://localhost:8808/decrypt -d 密文

现在我打算将配置库中 msa-config-client-dev 中的 info.qq = 497870337 的qq号进行加密

curl http://localhost:8808/encrypt -d 497870337 > msa.txt

获取到以下密文



步骤4：将配置库中的明文替换成密文

info:  desc: dev  # 注意，需要用添加加密前缀{cipher}并使用''包裹，否则解析异常  qq: '{cipher}'

访问测试

  • 可以看到，当Config Server获取到配置库的配置后会对其进行解密

客户端重试获取配置

添加依赖

<dependency>    <groupId>org.springframework.retry</groupId>    <artifactId>spring-retry</artifactId></dependency><dependency>    <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>    <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-aop</artifactId></dependency>

配置

spring:  application:    name: msa-config-client  cloud:    config:      retry:        initial-interval: 1000        max-interval: 2000        max-attempts: 5      discovery:        enabled: true        service-id: MSA-CONFIG-SERVER      profile: dev      label: master

Consul作公共配置中心案例

快速入门

依赖

<parent>    <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>    <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-parent</artifactId>    <version>2.1.5.RELEASE</version>    <relativePath/> <!-- lookup parent from repository --></parent><properties>    <java.version>1.8</java.version>    <spring-cloud.version>Greenwich.SR2</spring-cloud.version></properties><dependencyManagement>    <dependencies>        <dependency>            <groupId>org.springframework.cloud</groupId>            <artifactId>spring-cloud-dependencies</artifactId>            <version>${spring-cloud.version}</version>            <type>pom</type>            <scope>import</scope>        </dependency>    </dependencies></dependencyManagement><dependencies>    <dependency>        <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>        <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-actuator</artifactId>    </dependency>    <dependency>        <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>        <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId>    </dependency>    <dependency>        <groupId>org.springframework.cloud</groupId>        <artifactId>spring-cloud-starter-consul-config</artifactId>    </dependency>    <dependency>        <groupId>org.springframework.cloud</groupId>        <artifactId>spring-cloud-starter-consul-discovery</artifactId>    </dependency></dependencies>

配置 - bootstrap.yml

spring:  application:    name: msa-consul-config  profiles:    active: dev # 启动dev环境  cloud:    consul:      host: localhost      port: 8500      discovery:        register: true      config:        # 默认        # config/application,dev/data -> yaml        # config/application,pro/data -> yaml        # prefix: config        # 定制        # 服务名称/application,dev/data -> yaml        # msa-consul-config/application,dev/data -> yaml        prefix: msa-consul-config        enabled: true        format: YAML        data-key: data # 默认data值，对用consul中的key叫data        watch:          delay: 5000server:  port: 8080management:  endpoints:    web:      exposure:        include: '*'

在Consul创建对应的KV

启动功能

@EnableDiscoveryClient@SpringBootApplicationpublic class MsaConsulConfigApplication {    public static void main(String[] args) {        SpringApplication.run(MsaConsulConfigApplication.class, args);    }}

测试

是如何实现自动刷新配置的？

如果像要开启自动配置需要设置如下属性

spring:  application:    name: msa-consul-config  profiles:    active: dev # 启动dev环境  cloud:    consul:      host: localhost      port: 8500      config:        watch:          delay: 5000           # 执行实际：上次任务结束的时间+delay

那它是如何实现的呢？我们查看一下consul config自动配置类

public class ConsulConfigAutoConfiguration {    public static final String CONFIG_WATCH_TASK_SCHEDULER_NAME = "configWatchTaskScheduler";    @Configuration    @ConditionalOnClass(RefreshEndpoint.class)    protected static class ConsulRefreshConfiguration {            // 构建一个用来刷新配置的ConfigWatch        @Bean        @ConditionalOnProperty(name = "spring.cloud.consul.config.watch.enabled", matchIfMissing = true)        public ConfigWatch configWatch(ConsulConfigProperties properties,                ConsulPropertySourceLocator locator, ConsulClient consul,                @Qualifier(CONFIG_WATCH_TASK_SCHEDULER_NAME) TaskScheduler taskScheduler) {            return new ConfigWatch(properties, consul, locator.getContextIndexes(),                    taskScheduler);        }        // 以下就是Watch的定时任务        @Bean(name = CONFIG_WATCH_TASK_SCHEDULER_NAME)        @ConditionalOnProperty(name = "spring.cloud.consul.config.watch.enabled", matchIfMissing = true)        public TaskScheduler configWatchTaskScheduler() {            return new ThreadPoolTaskScheduler();        }    }}

先看一下 ThreadPoolTaskScheduler

/** * 官方注释： * Implementation of Spring's {@link TaskScheduler} interface, wrapping * a native {@link java.util.concurrent.ScheduledThreadPoolExecutor}. * 可以到这个定时任务是用ScheduledThreadPoolExecutor实现的 */@SuppressWarnings("serial")public class ThreadPoolTaskScheduler extends ExecutorConfigurationSupport        implements AsyncListenableTaskExecutor, SchedulingTaskExecutor, TaskScheduler {    // 单线程    private volatile int poolSize = 1;    @Override    public ScheduledFuture<?> scheduleWithFixedDelay(Runnable task, long delay) {        ScheduledExecutorService executor = getScheduledExecutor();        // 参数1：任务        // 参数2：第一次执行的延时时间        // 参数3：经过第一次后的延时时间        // 参数4：延时时间的单位        return executor.scheduleWithFixedDelay(errorHandlingTask(task, true), 0, delay, TimeUnit.MILLISECONDS);    }}

再看一下 ConfigWatch

public class ConfigWatch implements ApplicationEventPublisherAware, SmartLifecycle {    private final ConsulConfigProperties properties;    private final ConsulClient consul;    private final TaskScheduler taskScheduler;    private final AtomicBoolean running = new AtomicBoolean(false);    private ApplicationEventPublisher publisher;    @Override    public void start() {        // 将任务切换为已开启        if (this.running.compareAndSet(false, true)) {            this.watchFuture = this.taskScheduler.scheduleWithFixedDelay(                    this::watchConfigKeyValues,  // 任务                    this.properties.getWatch().getDelay()); // 延时值从配置获取        }    }    // 任务    @Timed("consul.watch-config-keys")    public void watchConfigKeyValues() {        // 任务是否处于开启状态        if (this.running.get()) {             for (String context : this.consulIndexes.keySet()) {                //...                // 获取Consul上的KV值                Response<List<GetValue>> response = this.consul.getKVValues(context,                        aclToken,                        new QueryParams(this.properties.getWatch().getWaitTime(),                                currentIndex));                if (response.getValue() != null && !response.getValue().isEmpty()) {                    Long newIndex = response.getConsulIndex();                    // 是否有配置？                    if (newIndex != null && !newIndex.equals(currentIndex)) {                        // 是不是新值？                        if (!this.consulIndexes.containsValue(newIndex) && !currentIndex.equals(-1L)) {                            //【重】发布刷新配置事件，要求RefreshEvent的监听者进行刷新操作                            RefreshEventData data = new RefreshEventData(context,currentIndex, newIndex);                            this.publisher.publishEvent(new RefreshEvent(this, data, data.toString()));                        }                    }                }            }        }    }    }

查看一下RefreshEvent的监听者 RefreshEventListener
